utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I thought I was a complete idiot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , I am with you . He even asked me if I thought you would go out with him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh ! Oh , I think I am gonna throw up a little bit . What did you say ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_He even asked me if I thought you would go out with him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What ? I ... I just figured since you are pregnant you are not gonna be seeing people .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay Joey , first of all Kash Ford is not people . Second of all , what did he say when you told him I was pregnant ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I did not tell him . I did not know if you were telling people . This is back when I thought Kash was still people .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Good ... good , do not tell him . Do not tell him . Just have him call me okay ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_do not tell him . Do not tell him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Rach look , I really do not think that is such a great

emotion_cause.span: 10_I really do not think that is such a great

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , you go do it ! I will come back to that set ! I will meet more actors ! I will meet em all !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I really do not think that is such a great
